assessment.note: Avoiding high-ambiguity forums to not seem underprepared signals a strong growth constraint and mild pullback from fully leaning in; also suggests a clarity/confidence issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Ambiguity forums
new_queue.name: High-ambiguity forums — what about them makes you feel underprepared?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific situations he avoids to surface the real gap behind the hesitation.

new_queue.label: Where you stand
new_queue.name: What's feeling solid in your role right now, and what's stretching you?
new_queue.description: Sets a calm baseline on Toby's current footing without re-asking the intro stretch question.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Sponsorship picture
new_queue.name: Who is already backing your strategic work, and who is not yet there?
new_queue.description: Tests whether sponsorship exists in practice and where the support gap sits.

new_queue.label: Next commitment
new_queue.name: What is the one move you want to make before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete commitment that can anchor the next conversation.
